problem: COPD and asthma affect nearly 10% of Earth's population, with COPD the 3rd leading cause of death worldwide. Late and inaccurate diagnosis drives billions in healthcare costs through preventable exacerbations and hospitalizations.
solution: N-Tidal platform combining patented CO2 sensor technology, connected handsets, and AI-driven analytics for rapid point-of-care COPD diagnosis and remote respiratory health monitoring.
